Resume

Ayşe Pınar Bozdoğan graduated from İhsan Doğramacı Bilkent Üniversitesi Hukuk Fakültesi (İhsan Doğramacı Bilkent University Faculty of Law) with honors in 2023. She obtained her lawyer's license in 2024 after completing her statutory internship.

She is currently continuing her thesis-based master's degree in Private Law at the İstanbul Üniversitesi Sosyal Bilimler Enstitüsü (Istanbul University Institute of Social Sciences) and works as a research assistant at the Civil Law Department of Istanbul 29 Mayıs University Faculty of Law.
